title: telosma minor
intro: Telosma minor, also known as the yellow pond lily or telosma, is a flowering plant species native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Telosma minor is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or extract, and is also used in traditional remedies for its antiseptic and wound-healing properties.
